title: Genomic-Agent”: Self-Correction AI
desc: Will develop an agentic AI system that autonomously detects and corrects DNA sequencing errors using large language models and Pinecone vector databases, and will deploy it as a FastAPI-based Docker microservice to deliver sub-millisecond request latency.

title: Agri-Vision”: Edge AI for Crops
desc: Will develop an Edge AI model using model quantization to enable deep learning detection on low-power IoT devices for farmers without internet access.
